rulings.Case Title: MARTIN J. COYNE ET AL VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A CALIFORNIA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday September 18, 2017, line 2. PLAINTIFF MARTIN COYNE, HOWARD WESTON, EDMUND CHUTE, SMALL PROPERTY OWNERS OF SAN FRANCISCO INSTITUTE, AMENDED MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES continued to October 5, 2017. Moving party is order to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of the moving papers to department 501 no later than September 20, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KIM KONAMI VS. ARYAN DAVANI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Davani Marble, Inc.'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Default And Default Judgment And Request To Set Aside And Vacate
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday September 18, 2017, line 7. Davani Marble, Inc.'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Default And Default Judgment And Request To Set Aside And Vacate GRANTED. Defendant shall file answer not later than September 18, 2017. Defendant shall remit $2,000 to Plaintiff's counsel to be received no later than September 22, 2017 in certified finds. Defendant to provide information for agent of process of service to the Secretary of State no later than September 22, 2017. Such agent shall be accessible for service between the hours of 8 a.m. and 5:00 a.m. on all business days. Defendant to file a declaration of compliance with this order no later than September 26, 2017 and provide a courtesy copy of the declaration to department 501 on the same day. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CARLA CLAY VS. MITCHELL BOYD ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday September 18, 2017, line 6. DEFENDANT MITCHELL BOYD DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. =(501/REQ)
